title: Fix congress speech bubble size and overlap

log.context: Fix congress speech bubble size and overlap

Done. Changes made to `/home/clungus/work/hello-world/congress.html` in the `.node-bubble` CSS rule:

| Property | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| `width` | 180px | 150px |
| `max-height` | 180px | 100px |
| `font-size` | 0.63rem | 0.65rem |
| `padding` | 8px 10px | 6px 8px |
| `line-height` | 1.5 | 1.4 |
| `box-shadow` | blur 12px | blur 8px |

The `.bubble-right`, `.bubble-left`, and `::before` pseudo-elements were left unchanged — their positioning offsets (`calc(100% + 10px)`) are relative ...(truncated)
